parameters: It's a pile of human bones.
It's a pile of human bones.
You look closer at the rope and notice letters written
from top to bottom.
"To those who've reached my throne.\. Yes,\. I made
a throne room.\. It's my labyrinth,\. what the poop's
your deal?\. I also wrote this in rope so only high
IQ individuals such as myself can read it."
"Anyway,\. welcome to the culmination of my life's work.\.
This labyrinth was my sanctuary,\. my workshop.\. In
order to surpass my master,\. I worked on one of the
greatest engimas of magic:\. immortality."
"Master Merlin told me 'This spell is so ass!' and 'Is
this why they kicked you out of magic school?' but you
know what I said? I told him to suck a fat one,\. and
I eventually attained immortality!"
"At least...\. I thought I did."
"Like...\. the magic sustained my life,\. just not the
rest of my body.\. I'm literally almost a skeleton now
as of writing."
"I'm entering a state of cognitive decline too.\. The
magic will one day take full control of my body and
I'll turn into some zombie.\. Shit.\. Anything I tried
to do to stop this only fanned the flames."
"That's why I made this whole labyrinth a puzzle.\.
Partly to show off my very high intellect,\. but also
to find a worthy mage who will continue my legacy and
right my really stupid wrongs."
"I will put myself in eternal slumber.\. I have this
labyrinth programmed as a dungeon.\. When I awaken,\.
it won't be me anymore.\. Just a really angry skeleton.\.
Defeating me is the condition to clearing this dungeon."
"Defeating me shall prove that you are a high-tier
mage.\. When you are ready,\. just say the words
'Merlin is poopoo,' and I will awaken.\. Thanks!
- Akashoz"
<cl: light 800 #ff7f7f>
[Young mage!\. You have reached far!]
[The final challenge awaits you.\. Descend the stairs,\.
and walk forward.\. The challenge will present itself
to you.]
A
